title: Enrich basher.json for tracks
one_liner: Fill in environment.path_entries, hooks, and tooling.required in WAI-Spoke/basher.json for tracks.
why_this_matters: basher.json for tracks has tab/alias/tier but empty environment/hooks/tooling sections. Basher cannot restore this spoke's environment without these fields. Spoke agent has filesystem access to detect these accurately.

steps: 1. Read dotfiles/bashrc.basher (or .bashrc.basher at root) — extract 'export PATH=' lines → environment.path_entries[] with dir, purpose, introduced_by='enrich-lug', restore_criticality based on whether project needs it to run
2. Read .claude/settings.json — extract hooks whose command path is NOT under ~/.claude/ (local hooks only) → hooks[] with event, command, purpose
3. Read package.json / requirements.txt / Cargo.toml / go.mod → tooling.required[] with name, install_cmd, check_cmd, purpose

acceptance_criteria: At least one of path_entries, hooks, or tooling.required is non-empty after update
All added entries have purpose and restore_criticality fields set
JSON is valid and basher.json remains parseable

_behavior_directive.what_this_is: A fill-in task for the spoke agent to populate its own basher.json by reading its own filesystem
_behavior_directive.what_this_is_NOT: A request to change code, create new scripts, or modify anything outside basher.json
